codes.UNKNOWN_ERROR: Kuna hitilafu imetokea. Please try again shortly.
codes.NETWORK_ERROR: We could not connect kwa server. Please check your internet connection na try again.
codes.REQUEST_TIMEOUT: server took too long kwa respond. Please try again.
codes.BACKEND_HOST_UNREACHABLE: We could not reach server. Please check your internet connection na try again.
codes.SECURE_CONNECTION_FAILED: Secure connection failed. Check backend HTTPS certificate.
codes.CONFLICT: This update conflicts na newer saved clinical data
codes.VALIDATION_ERROR: Please check highlighted fields na try again.
codes.SERVER_ERROR: Kuna hitilafu imetokea while processing your request. Please try again shortly.
codes.BACKEND_UNAVAILABLE: We could not connect kwa server right now. Please try again shortly.
codes.BACKEND_ENDPOINT_NOT_FOUND: Backend API endpoint was not found. domain is reachable, but API route is not deployed.
codes.RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND: requested record could not be found. Please onyesha upya na try again.
codes.ADMISSION_NOT_FOUND: admission record could not be found. Please return kwa ufuatiliaji na try again.
codes.BACKEND_METHOD_NOT_ALLOWED: Backend endpoint exists but does not accept this request.
codes.BACKEND_INVALID_RESPONSE: Backend returned an invalid sign-in response. It may be serving website instead of API.
codes.SESSION_STORAGE_FAILED: We could not hifadhi your sign-in session. Please try again.
codes.RATE_LIMITED: Too many requests. Wait a moment na try again.
codes.ROUTE_ERROR: An hitilafu occurred while inapakia this page
codes.INVALID_CREDENTIALS: Invalid barua pepe au nenosiri. Please check your details na try again.
codes.MULTIPLE_TENANTS: Multiple tenants found. Please chagua a tenant.
codes.REFRESH_TOKEN_INVALID: Invalid au expired onyesha upya token
codes.SESSION_EXPIRED: Your session expired. Ingia again kwa endelea.
codes.USER_EXISTS: This barua pepe is already registered. Please sign in instead.
codes.AI_UNAUTHORIZED: AI API key invalid au expired
codes.ADMISSION_SAVE_FAILED: Haiwezi kuhifadhi admission record. Angalia muunganisho wako na ujaribu tena
codes.ADMISSION_VALIDATION_FAILED: Some inahitajika admission details are missing. Please kagua highlighted fields.
codes.ADMISSION_RECOMMENDATION_FAILED: Unable kwa generate clinical recommendations right now. You can still kagua na hifadhi admission.
codes.VENTILATION_SESSION_DRAFT_LOAD_FAILED: Haiwezi kupakia admission form. Angalia muunganisho wako na ujaribu tena
codes.VENTILATION_SESSION_DRAFT_SAVE_FAILED: Haiwezi kuhifadhi local admission draft. Please try again

disclaimer.title: Kanusho
disclaimer.prototypeFraming: This app is a prototype kwa reference na training. It is not intended kwa direct clinical use.
disclaimer.acknowledgeHint: Confirm that you have read na understood kanusho

capture.title: Dataset capture
capture.governanceNotice: Captured candidates are submitted kwa reviewer approval only. Raw pasted notes are not stored in approved datasets au sent kwa external model services.
capture.roleBlocked: Dataset candidate capture requires an approved clinical write jukumu.
capture.offlineNotice: Nje ya mtandao submissions are kwenye foleni na structured fields only na sync when connectivity returns.
capture.notePlaceholder: Paste a de-identified bedside note, then kagua structured fields before submitting.
capture.facilityMissing: Chagua au sign in kwa one active kituo before submitting.
capture.noteRequired: Paste a note before creating a preview.
capture.identifierWarning: Identifier-like text was detected. It is not included in structured kagua payload.
capture.trainingApprovalAvailable: Training approval controls remain in governed kagua workflows.

privacy.title: Faragha
privacy.localStorageDescription: Preferences na session data are stored only on this device. Hakunathing is sent kwa external servers.
privacy.optionalAI: If mtandaoni AI features are enabled, those requests may be sent kwa configured services.

about.title: Kuhusu
about.prototypeScope: This is a prototype kwa reference na training. Hakunat kwa clinical use.

safety.title: Clinical safety
safety.body: AI Vent provides documentation support na advisory safety prompts only. It does not replace clinical judgment, issue treatment orders, au determine mashine ya kupumulia mipangilio.
safety.secondary: Confirm all decisions against mgonjwa, your kituo workflow, na local clinical protocol.
safety.acknowledgeLabel: I understand this is advisory decision support only
safety.acknowledgeHint: Inahitajika before continuing kwa clinical workflows
safety.syncDeferred: Safety acknowledgement is saved on this device na will be imesawazishwa when backend authentication is available.

clinicalSafety.title: Use as advisory support
clinicalSafety.body: Kagua safety note before using AI Vent. app can highlight missing data na uncertainty, but a qualified clinician remains responsible kwa mgonjwa care decisions.

facilityWorkflow.title: Stay in kituo context
facilityWorkflow.body: Use active kituo na jukumu shown by your session. Keep records within correct kituo workflow na follow local escalation, kagua, na approval procedures.

inputs.title: Wekaing inputs
inputs.body: Use Laza kwa weka available clinical parameters (SpO2, PaO2, PaCO2, pH, respiratory rate, etc.). Hiari ABG values improve confidence when available, but missing hiari data should be reviewed as uncertainty rather than treated as a hifadhi blocker.

recommendations.title: Interpreting recommendations
recommendations.body: Recommendations onyesha advisory mashine ya kupumulia setting references na a confidence tier. Match quality reflects how well dataset cases align na your inputs. Use matched cases as reference only na verify against clinical judgment.

monitoring.title: Ufuatiliaji na alerts
monitoring.body: After reviewing a pendekezo, use Ufuatiliaji kwa log vitals na labs over time. Alerts highlight values outside set thresholds na should be assessed according kwa local protocol.

offline.title: Nje ya mtandao behavior
offline.body: Core workflow (Laza, advisory summaries, ufuatiliaji) works nje ya mtandao. Data is saved locally. Hiari AI features require connectivity. When rudi mtandaoni, endelea as kawaida.

glossary.PEEP: Positive end-expiratory pressure (cmH₂O). Maintains lung volume na oxygenation.
glossary.FiO2: Fraction of inspired oxygen (0–1). Percentage of oxygen in inspired gas.
glossary.IERatio: I:E ratio. Inspiratory kwa expiratory time ratio (e.g. 1:2).
glossary.tidalVolume: Kiasi cha pumzi (mL). Volume delivered per breath.
glossary.PaCO2: Partial pressure of arterial carbon dioxide (mmHg).
glossary.ABG: Arterial blood gas values such as PaO2, PaCO2, na pH, tied kwa a sample time.
glossary.referenceStatus: Governance na verification state kwa a reference range. Only active approved au verified ranges are eligible kwa active decision-support display.
glossary.datasetCapture: Candidate de-identified records that need kagua before dataset au training use.
glossary.reviewQueue: A work queue kwa kagua decisions, corrections, exclusions, na audit reasons.
glossary.syncState: Current nje ya mtandao, mtandaoni, au syncing state. Clinical records may still need later sync.
glossary.shadowMode: Governed model evaluation mode where outputs remain hidden kutoka kawaida clinical workflows.

missingABG.title: Missing ABG values
missingABG.body: Recommendations work without ABG; weka SpO₂ na nyingine vitals when available. kwa better matching, ongeza PaO₂, PaCO₂, na pH when you have them.

offline.title: Using app nje ya mtandao
offline.body: Laza, advisory summaries, na ufuatiliaji work nje ya mtandao. Data is stored locally. Hiari AI suggestions require internet. Sync is not inahitajika kwa core workflow.

unverifiedReference.title: Reference range is not active
unverifiedReference.body: Draft, inasubiri, retired, rejected, na unverified ranges are not eligible kwa active decision-support display. Kagua source, version, scope, na verification status.

roleRestrictedModelHelp.title: Model-readiness msaada is restricted
roleRestrictedModelHelp.body: Predictive model readiness na shadow-mode details are visible only kwa approved governance roles. Hakunarmal clinical workflows do not expose model internals.

needsReview.title: Record needs kagua
needsReview.body: Use kagua queue kwa check submitted data, request correction, idhinisha eligible records, au ondoa records na an audit sababu.

guides.home: Kagua kituo context, sync state, active admissions, red flags, na records needing kagua before opening a mgonjwa workflow.
guides.admit: Capture mgonjwa pathway na available clinical values. Mark unavailable data clearly na kagua backend-confirmed calculations after hifadhi.
guides.tracking: Use ufuatiliaji kwa scan recent ventilation status na kagua needs. Read trend flags na source data na local protocol context.
guides.abgVentUpdate: Add new ABG results and ventilator settings as time-stamped records so earlier values remain available for review.
guides.datasetCapture: Use dataset capture kwa de-identified candidate records. Human kagua is inahitajika before approved training-data use.
guides.reviewQueue: Use kagua queue kwa idhinisha, request correction, au ondoa records while preserving audit trail.
guides.dashboard: Use dashboards kwa aggregate quality, kagua, reference, na governance status. Avoid mgonjwa identifiers in governance summaries.
guides.settings: Use mipangilio kwa akaunti, kituo, accessibility, faragha, sync, na reference visibility preferences where authorized.
guides.hypoxemia: Kagua FiO₂ na PEEP; consider recruitment; check kwa shunt au V/Q mismatch.
guides.hypercapnia: Kagua minute ventilation (rate × tidal volume); consider permissive hypercapnia per protocol.
guides.acidosis: Address ventilation na perfusion; correct underlying cause per protocol.
guides.general: Use recommendations as decision support only. Validate against local protocols na clinical judgment.

ai.label: Usaidizi wa maamuzi wa AI
ai.enableHint: Use mtandaoni AI kwa complex cases only; local recommendations always available
ai.providerHint: AI provider (e.g. OpenAI); API key is per provider

patientReason.description: Capture mgonjwa pathway, umri, body metrics, na sababu kwa support.

oxygenAbgVentilator.description: Record current oxygen support, observation time, oxygenation, vital signs, available ABG values, na uncertain values. Mashine ya kupumulia mipangilio are suggested on ifuatayo step kutoka dataset.
oxygenAbgVentilator.oxygenSupportHint: Choose support mgonjwa is receiving when these values are measured.
oxygenAbgVentilator.timeHint: Use local date na time kwa observation.

saveReview.description: Kagua na hariri dataset-suggested mashine ya kupumulia mipangilio, backend readiness, clinician confirmation, override sababu when needed, kagua status, na sync state.
saveReview.suggestedSettingsHint: Prefilled from the dataset using patient biodata and the current oxygen and ABG values. Edit only when the bedside decision differs.
saveReview.recommendationEmpty: Weka clinical values na tap Ifuatayo kwa generate a dataset pendekezo.
saveReview.recommendationError: Unable kwa generate clinical recommendations right now. You can still kagua na hifadhi admission.
saveReview.recommendationNeedsClinicalInputs: Pendekezo needs clinical sababu, SpO2, respiratory rate, na heart rate.
saveReview.clinicianConfirmed: Clinician confirms this admission record is ready kwa hifadhi kagua.

observations.title: Additional observations
observations.description: Record any extra clinical data not covered above (e.g. labs, imaging, medications, comorbidity scores). Each observation is a single jina–value pair. Hiari; you can skip this step.
observations.name: Jina

timeSeries.title: Time series (vital signs over time)
timeSeries.description: Track vital signs au nyingine metrics at multiple time points (e.g. SpO₂, RR, HR at 0h, 1h, 2h). Used kwa trend analysis na ufuatiliaji after you start session. Hiari; you can ongeza points later on ufuatiliaji screen.
timeSeries.name: Jina
